chapter_title: St. Improvements & Assessments in Certain Municipalities
text: In this subchapter, “railway” includes a street railway and an interurban.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 313. St. Improvements & Assessments in Certain Municipalities
##### § 313.041 — Definition

In this subchapter, “railway” includes a street railway and an interurban.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.text: In this subchapter, “railway” includes a street railway and an interurban.

history.raw: Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.
